case_title: AMBASSADOR HOTEL SRO ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LTD VS. HAROLD JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMBASSADOR HOTEL SRO ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LTD PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HAROLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 MASON STREET #604, SF, CA 94102 $915.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
